reviews.review_description: good game played the freekick mode than the heading like thel eaderboards iv been top of few without even notice as i was just playing game
Gg

This is so much fun! 
The psychics are very realistic and it feels like you are at a real stadium even though the graphics could be better. 

I wish the replay showed your head movement a little bit more realistically. 

Would be cool with some kind of career mode so that you could continue a game.

Probably should not be necessary to select language each time you open the game.

developer_response.body: Hi Mellowcide thank you so much for playing and supporting the game! Also thank you for the detailed feedbacks and there will be improvements coming for sure!

reviews.review_description: This game is honestly amazing. It's a simple concept and it gives you hours of fun. Iv had the game for a while now and I don't regret it at all the owner is a great person and the game itself is so much fun. Honestly worth the price and an amazing game
I hope they add it soon the kicking mode but overall it’s a great game ￼

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! And yes the kicking mode is coming soon so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
Not bad but it will get old soon as it's repetitive. 

I'd give 4 starts if when post or bar hit it would make nice load satisfying sound !! Can't believe they didn't do it ( don't think they are soccer / football fanatics haha , the crators)

developer_response.body:
I am sorry that the game didn't meet your expectation, please give it another chance when it's out of early access.
About the bar/post sound I did do the sound effect (as it sound at 0:17 on the trailer), but if you didn't hear it there might be some bugs occured, I will fix that.
I am really a football fan that's the main reason I decide to do football game instead of another sport.
EDIT: Hi I am sure the post and bar make nice sound now and there is a new game mode to the game please give it a try!

reviews.review_description: Football: Goal Poacher (Soccer) is an incredibly clever and entertaining game! My daughter has been learning how to perfect her headers without the pain, and she’s been practicing over and over to sharpen her skills—thank you so much for that! Personally, I feel like Cristiano Ronaldo when I time my headers perfectly and get that satisfying feeling of placing the ball in a tight spot! Highly recommended for anyone who loves the game and wants to improve their technique while having fun.
I have been a beta tester for this game and the improvements have been massive. Keep up the good work. The dev team is highly responsive and creative. Recommended to all! A++
Worth every penny

This VR game is fun, but it would be even better if it included defensive play, allowing you to clear the ball with your head. Adding a mode where you alternate between attacking and defending to win matches and even tournaments would make the experience more dynamic and immersive. I hope to see these features in future updates!

developer_response.body: Thank you a lot for the positive comment! We will consider adding defensive gameplay to make the game more dynamic!

reviews.review_description:
Great start for an early access game with lots of potential.

Love the defender and gk interactions. The way they pressure, clear, block and save. It makes scoring all the more satisfying. The feeling of scoring a difficult chance is very satisfying. Hitting the back of the net feels great especially with the excellent net physics. I look forward to future developments
The game visuals and ball physics are impressively polished. I like the slow-mo mode in beginner's mode, which makes it easier for someone like me to get into the game.

The mandatory hand lift before game start is completely useless.
Please cancel it or maybe make an option.

Game physics are superb!

developer_response.body:
Thank you a lot, this issue will be addressed in the next update!
Edit: On our newest version you can skip by pressing the primary trigger on the controller!

reviews.review_description: This game is very fun. You use your head to hit the ball and score, which is a very unique gameplay mechanic. It's exciting to imagine yourself as the soccer player who decides the outcome of the match—success or failure depends on your skills. Soccer fans definitely need to give it a try.

Just got this game the other day. Found it by accident and so glad I did. It is one of the best sports games on the quest in terms of realistic performance. I believe it’s still in development stage so hopefully we can expect much more. Please please can you give us quest 3 users a higher resolution update. It would look so much better.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the positive review, yes more content is coming!
Edit: Resolution update is live for both Quest 2 and 3 users! Lets check it out!

reviews.review_title: It’s more training than a game
reviews.review_description: It’s pretty cool and the physics are impressive in terms of accuracy. One thing I would say is that every game mode is the same for the first 10 minutes or so, so the first time you play it and want to test all the options you literally have to spend half an hour replaying the tutorial over and over again in different kits. It’s more of a training for headers than a game, and in that sense, it’s great. I really felt like I could learn to be better at headers. But that’s sort of it, heading a ball into a net from different set pieces. I would make it so there’s an option to not have to cancel the action replay every time, it’s never impressive enough to warrant an action replay of you standing there with a ball bouncing off your head and with that and having to put your arm in the air to get the ball it’s a bit of a wait in between each attempt..

This game takes you straight into the boots of a goal-hungry striker, delivering thrilling moments and some great chances for glory.
The physics engine ensures every header feels satisfying and accurate, while the AI provides a realistic challenge, it is great watching your teammates passing the ball around the net before you get the chance to header into the corner.   
And this is played in the comfort of your space and what makes it great as you don’t need a massive room to play.  Scoring with accuracy is a great feeling whilst boosting your score and moving you up the leaderboard for players who thrive on competition.
This game states Early Access, it doesn’t feel it, it’s really quite well polished already and therefore - Highly recommended!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review I am happy you enjoyed it!

reviews.review_description:
This game recreates Euro 2024! And the Copa America and the World Cup!

I can be the Cristina Ronaldo of the Portugal national team!
And a suggestion: I won on the hardest mode! It could be harder. Competing with the defender for the ball, or competing with the goalkeeper, would be even better.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the positive review! And we have noted your suggestion!

reviews.review_description:
This is a cool game!
One of its kind on Quest.

It puts you in a position of a striker, whose goal (no pun intended) is to score by heading the ball into the goal.

You get multipliers, which increase each time you hit them, and a ball icon, which gives you an extra ball/chance.

The goal is to try hit the multipliers and balls to keep increasing your score and getting extra goes to keep your game going for as long as possible.

You get a scoreboard that shows global scores.. and friends if they play it too.

Graphics are good, atmosphere is good, physics are good… I did get the odd ball/shot go a strange angle sometimes, but this was rare and frustrating.

But yeah, a very fun and interesting game… I recommend.

I played it sitting down, but can be played standing up too.

Would be good if they add multiplayer, where each player takes it in turns to score… maybe have 10 chances each… with final score at the end of the match.

developer_response.body: Thank you ^^ I will investigate the issue you encountered, and more features coming to the game for sure!

reviews.review_description:
I love this game. Really amazing.
would like to suggest adding the following features:

	1.	The ability to replay goal scenes on the big screen.
	2.	In the difficulty settings, add an option to adjust the percentage of slow motion, as it’s challenging to hit the ball when switching to real speed.
	3.	Populate the area outside the court with all the players to enhance realism.
	4.	Is it possible to reduce the waiting time between each serve?

developer_response.body: Thank you for the positive review! About your suggestions, yes we will see how we can implement those features into the game, so please join our Discord so I can notify you when there are updates that add the features you are interested! https://discord.gg/Xyp2SyyKXv
